title: Facilitator Guide — Day 1: Agency Orientation & Entrepreneur Mindset
prepChecklist: Confirm squad assignments and advisory dyad pairings
Print or share vision board materials and squad charter template
Test projector / slide deck and speaker notes visibility
Review Day 1 worksheet rubric with mentors

sessionFlow.notes: Set incubator tone. Avoid classroom language. Use discussion questions on slides 1–2.
Circulate among squads. Capture photos of boards for portfolio evidence.
Mentors check in with squads on alignment with Week 1 goals.
Ensure every intern has a named role for Week 1 rotation.
Worksheet feeds Venture Blueprint Vision & Purpose — remind interns before submit.
Faculty observation rubric. Close with reflection prompts.

debriefQuestions: Which squad vision boards showed the strongest alignment between personal why and venture thesis?
Where did interns struggle to distinguish entrepreneurship from traditional employment?
What coaching will mentors provide before Day 2?
commonPitfalls: Treating SPIKE as a lecture course rather than an incubator
Skipping squad charter — leads to unclear research roles in Week 1
Rushing the personal why worksheet — quality drives Blueprint Vision module
coachingTips: Ask each intern to state their why aloud before worksheet submit
Link every activity output to Portfolio Identity & Purpose and Business Plan Chapter 1
Flag interns who did not complete reflection for mentor follow-up
